case_title: IN RE: SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC et al
cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (for approval of transfer of structured settlement payment rights)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-20-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED BY THE COURT. THE REQUIRED DISCLOSURE HAVING BEEN MADE AND THE DECLARATION FROM THE INDIVIDUAL INDICATED HE HAS FULL KNOWLEDGE OF ALL THE NECESSARY FACTS AND THE COURT JUSTIFYING THAT THE TRANSACTION IS FOR THE BEST INTEREST OF THE PARTIES AND IS REASONABLE, THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, L L C'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights IS GRANTED BY THE COURT. THE REQUIRED DISCLOSURE HAVING BEEN MADE AND THE DECLARATION FROM THE INDIVIDUAL INDICATED HE HAS FULL KNOWLEDGE OF ALL THE NECESSARY FACTS AND THE COURT JUSTIFYING THAT THE TRANSACTION IS FOR THE BEST INTEREST OF THE PARTIES AND IS REASONABLE, THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
